brief_notes: Well-structured technical paper with formal theorems, methods, and background sections. Core numbers match: 65%/76% subclones/mutations missed, 264 simulated instances, 95.6x vs Gurobi, 105.1x vs CPLEX, mean 1229.8s for n=1000, 71749.1s for Orchard 48h budget. ARI claims and F1 scores (fastBE 0.965, Pairtree 0.972, Orchard 0.965 for n=10) are faithful. 5 figures. Discussion develops both algorithmic and interpretive angles. Writing is dense but well organized with topic sentences and cross-section transitions.
